summary: According to Jim Cramer, Applied Materials, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMAT) is a really great company and its business is okay, but he likes Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ: LRCX) better.

headline: Elon Musk's 2018 Compensation Plan May Hurt S&P 500 Inclusion
summary: Shareholders of Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) approved a compensation plan for CEO Elon Musk back in 2018 that may complicate future inclusion in the S&P 500.
